svg.text: 当前 knowledge-insert 流程
目标 source-first 流程
上传 source / attachment
accepted source create_source_from_attachment
prepare resource split blocks split batches
worker extraction entities / assertions / relations evidenceAnchors / sectionCandidates / topicHints
merge_extracted_knowledge audit_extraction_coverage
merge_section_candidates 生成 normalized sections
resolve_topic_hosts 对每个 section 做 host decision
taxonomy skipped 当前不经过 source -> topic -> taxonomy 规划
build_topic_insertion_plan
draft / review / apply topic -> sections[] 写回 wiki
回读 read_wiki_page read_raw_source
上传 source / attachment
source overview 先看整份 source 的主题范围、上下文、scope
topic 决策 reuse existing topic or create new topic
taxonomy 决策 root -> new node / merge / leaf attach
按正文切出 sections 保留贴源 body 不是只做 summary
section attach 挂到 topic / taxonomy / parent section
graph semantic write entity / concept / assertion / relation
source anchors locator / excerpt / source path 支持 section / assertion 回源
writer / reviewer 保持 topic -> sections 结构写回
agent 读路径 taxonomy -> topic -> section -> evidence -> source
当前 host resolve 单位 = section
taxonomy 缺失
先从 source 做主题判断
当前 host resolve 单位 = section
taxonomy 缺失
先从 source 做主题判断
